title: Specs the build agent can execute
description: Impl docs now have two durable sections: UX (how it looks and feels) and Technology (how it gets built), with UX leading and Technology serving. Every detail discussed lands in the file, no filtering, so the coding agent has the full spec instead of half the context in chat. Briefs lead with a DAG of atomic specs, and a new Build mode brackets plan mode with the open/close bookkeeping.
